mbean:
Media Writer Service for Primera Technology PTPublish/PTBurn 3 SDK. Submits ISO images to a Primera Disc Publisher robot (Bravo SE/II/PRO/XR/XRP/Xi/4100) by writing a Job Request File (.JRQ) to a PTBurn hot-folder and polling for completion (.don/.err). Compatible with PTBurn SDK revision 3.24 (Sep 2011).
org.dcm4chex.cdw.ptpublish.PTPublishService
Default constructor PTPublishService
UNC or local path to the PTBurn Job Request Folder (hot-folder). PTBurn must have write access to this folder from the service machine. Example: /var/lib/dcm4chee-cdw/ptburn/jobs
JobRequestFolder java.lang.String
UNC or local path to the folder where PTBurn writes its status files (SystemStatus.txt and RobotName.txt). Leave blank to use JobRequestFolder. Override only if StatusPath is set differently in PTSETUP.INI.
StatusFolder java.lang.String
Local base path used by dcm4chee to locate ISO and label files. Paths written to JRQ keys ImageFile and PrintLabel must be translated from this local prefix to SharedPathPrefix.
LocalPathPrefix java.lang.String
PTBurn-visible shared folder prefix for files referenced in JRQ. Example: \\HOST\ptburn
SharedPathPrefix java.lang.String
Name of the Primera robot as it appears in [RobotList] of SystemStatus.txt (e.g. "Disc Publisher XRP"). Used to locate the per-robot status file for job completion details.
RobotName java.lang.String
ClientID string written into each .JRQ file (up to 32 chars). Appears in the PTBurn window and status files.
ClientId java.lang.String
Number of disc copies to produce per media creation request (1-10000).
Copies int
Requested burn speed passed to PTBurn (1-100). 0 = max available speed.
BurnSpeed int
If true, PTBurn verifies each disc after burning (VerifyDisc=YES).
VerifyDisc boolean
If true, the disc is finalized so no further sessions can be added (CloseDisc=YES). Recommended for DICOM media.
CloseDisc boolean
If true, discs that are not blank are rejected (RejectIfNotBlank=YES).
RejectIfNotBlank boolean
If true, PTBurn deletes the ISO image and JRQ file from the hot-folder after job completion (DeleteFiles=YES). Only set if the ISO is in a sub-folder of the hot-folder, as PTBurn deletes the entire sub-folder.
DeleteFiles boolean
Interval in milliseconds between polls for .don/.err completion marker files. Minimum 500ms.
PollIntervalMs int
Maximum seconds to wait for a job to complete. 0 = wait indefinitely.
JobTimeoutSecs int
Number of retries on transient failure (e.g. no blank media).
NumberOfRetries int
Seconds to wait between retries (minimum 10).
RetryIntervalSecs int
Job priority passed to PTBurn (0=highest, 400=lowest; default 4). Lower values are processed first.
Importance int
Bin from which PTBurn picks blank discs: 0=both/default, 1=left, 2=right.
BinId int
Keep spool files on failure (for debugging).
KeepSpoolFiles boolean
If true, invoke the LabelPrintService after PTBurn completes (in addition to any PrintLabel= specified in the JRQ).
PrintLabel boolean
Controls when label files are kept: YES, NO, or IF_NOT_PRINTED.
KeepLabelFiles java.lang.String
JMX ObjectName of the LabelPrint service (optional).
LabelPrintName javax.management.ObjectName
JMX ObjectName of the SpoolDir service.
SpoolDirName javax.management.ObjectName
Returns current PTBurn interface state for a job ID based on hot-folder marker files and timeout window. States: JRQ, QRJ, INP, DON, ERR, TIMEOUT(...), UNKNOWN.
getJobState
PTBurn job ID (with or without extension). jobId java.lang.String
java.lang.String
&defaultOperations;
